description: Composition White polo T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves with the 3-Stripe running through it, ribbed and contrast spread collar, half buttoned placket, printed branding on the left chest and contrast panel stitch along the sides Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softener Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Classic adidas polo tee for the sporty at heart. Made of polyester that neatly contours your shoulders, this T-shirt can be worn under a zip-up sweatshirt and tracks, or simply with jeans and tonal casual shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
